commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a once-per-process Claude CLI warning when OpenClaw YOLO exec policy overrides a restrictive raw Claude `--permission-mode`, updates the related regression test, and adds a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +14, Tests +6, Docs +1. Total +21 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main already has the raw `--permission-mode default` plus YOLO path that silently normalizes to `bypassPermissions`, and the PR extends the existing regression test for that path. I did not run a live Claude session in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human handling is needed for the protected maintainer label and missing external real behavior proof; there is no narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to make.
